metadata.description: Bizer's open AI agent skills library — portable SKILL.md bundles backed by published research and evaluations.

plugins.name: bizer-skills
plugins.description: Bizer's open agent skills, research-backed and transcript-evaluated: Fraud Watch (surface possible fraud in bank transactions), Goal Setting (one clear goal into a dated plan), Dream List (brain-dump to prioritized roadmap), and Quote to Paid (get every job paid).
